title: Heritage Oak Gas Log Set | Heat & Glo
description: Heritage Oak gas log set: a hand-crafted oak log arrangement with realistic bark detail and a layered flame pattern. Vented configuration for traditional fireplace retrofits.

hero.eyebrow: HERITAGE OAK — VENTED GAS LOG SET
hero.h1: Hand-crafted oak. The kind of fire that earns a long stare.
hero.lede: The Heritage Oak gas log set captures the bark detail, layered embers, and irregular flame behavior of a real oak fire. Vented configuration retrofits cleanly into existing traditional fireplace openings.
